title: Paul Anthony 'Style Pro' USB-C Lithium Tramline Detailing & Stubble T-Bar Trimmer with LCD Display, Zero mm Cutting and 4 Combs 1mm - 6mm - H5136A
availability_text: Only 2 left in stock (more on the way).
features: LITHIUM POWER - The high power, ultra-fast charging lithium-ion battery is ready to use in less than 5 minutes. It is fully charged in around 2 hours, which will provide approximately 3 hours of operation. Use any USB 5v DC power source, but 2100mAh recommended.
LCD DISPLAY - The integrated LCD display shows the percentage of battery remaining before charge, speed in RPM and charging status.
3 SPEED CONTROL - Adjustable speed from 6500rpm, 7000rpm and 7500rpm provides agility when cutting different hair thicknesses and textures.

40MM WIDE T-BAR - The 40mm wide high carbon stainless steel blades are perfectly designed for optimum manouverability, comfort and precision. USB-C - This professional trimmer comes with a USB Charging cable only. A USB Power source is needed.

ZERO MM to 6MM - The Paul Anthony Style Pro is the perfect tool for adding tramlines and detailing tattoo to your hair, offering a zero mm cutting performance with zero overlap and 4 interchangeable combs for 1mm, 2mm, 3mm and 6mm hair, beard amd sideburn trimming.
description: Product Description The Paul Anthony 'Style Pro' USB-C Lithium Tramline / Tattoo Detailing and Stubble Trimmer offers quiet, smooth and precise trimming performance with optimum control. Charging by any USB source and withing 5 minutes of charging the Trimmer is ready for action. A full charge takes 2 hours and will give upto 3 hours of continuous use. The built in LCD Display shows you the amount of charge left in the battery before you need to recharge, speed and charging status. The Paul Anthony Style Pro comes with four individual combs of 1mm, 2mm, 3mm and 6mm and the 40mm T-Bar will precisely cut tramlines to 0mm and has a zero mm overlap. The perfect tool for creating precise tramlines and hair tattoos whilst maintining a clean beard trim. Included in the box: 1x Paul Anthony Style Pro Detailing & Stubble Trimmer 4x Combs Attachments 1x USB Cable 1x Oil 1x Manual Safety Warning Use with caution. Keep away from water. Do not use on infants. Follow recommended cleaning and maintenance procedures.
